meta.title: Multi-City Trip Planner — AI Itineraries for 2+ Cities | MonkeyTravel
meta.description: Plan trips across up to 5 cities in one itinerary. Add stops and nights — AI splits your days per city automatically. Free, up to 21 days.

hero.title: Multi-City Trip Planner
hero.subtitle: Plan Tokyo → Kyoto → Osaka or Athens → Santorini → Mykonos in one itinerary. Add your stops and nights — the AI splits your days per city automatically and stitches everything into a single day-by-day plan.

features.title: Built for Trips That Don't Stay in One City
features.subtitle: Everything the single-city planner does, extended across your whole route.

dayAllocation.title: Per-City Day Allocation
dayAllocation.description: Set how many nights you want in each city and the AI plans exactly that many days there — 3 nights in Kyoto means three full Kyoto days, not a guess.

journeyOverview.title: Journey Overview
journeyOverview.description: A city-by-city ribbon shows your whole route at a glance: where you start, how long you stay, where you head next. No spreadsheets required.

citiesAndDays.title: Up to 5 Cities & 21 Days
citiesAndDays.description: Chain up to five cities and three weeks into one itinerary — enough for Japan's Golden Route, a Greek island hop, or a full grand tour of Italy.

groupVoting.title: Group Voting
groupVoting.description: Share the trip with your travel crew, let everyone vote on stops and activities, and lock in the route the whole group actually wants.

step1.title: Add Stops & Nights
step1.description: List your cities in order and set the nights for each — Rome for 3, Florence for 2, Venice for 2. Done in seconds.

step2.title: AI Plans Every City in Parallel
step2.description: Each city gets its own day-by-day plan, generated simultaneously and stitched into one continuous itinerary with the right days in the right places.

step3.title: Drag, Edit & Share
step3.description: Reorder activities, swap venues, rebalance days — then share the trip with friends or keep it to yourself. It's your route.

routes.title: Popular Multi-City Routes
routes.subtitle: Start from a classic and make it yours — every route opens the planner in multi-city mode.

japan.name: Japan Golden Route
japan.description: Neon, temples, and street food — the classic first-timer line through Japan's big three.

greece.name: Greek Islands
greece.description: Ancient ruins, caldera sunsets, and island nightlife in one sweep of the Aegean.

iberia.name: Iberia
iberia.description: Gaudí and the beach, then the Prado and rooftop bars — Spain's two heavyweights back to back.

italy.name: Italy Classic
italy.description: Colosseum mornings, Renaissance afternoons, canal evenings — Italy's essential trio.

splitDays.question: How does the AI split days between cities?
splitDays.answer: You set the nights per city when you build your route, and the AI allocates whole days to match. Each city is generated as its own mini-itinerary, then everything is stitched into one continuous day-by-day plan. Want a different balance? Change the nights and regenerate.

cityLimit.question: How many cities can I add to one trip?
cityLimit.answer: Up to five cities in a single itinerary. That covers most classic routes — Tokyo–Kyoto–Osaka, Rome–Florence–Venice, or a three-island Greek hop — while keeping each stop long enough to actually enjoy.

longTrips.question: Can I plan a trip longer than 2 weeks?
longTrips.answer: Yes — multi-city trips go up to 21 days, versus 14 for single-city trips. That's enough for a full three-week route without splitting your plan across separate trips.

isFree.question: Is the multi-city planner free?
isFree.answer: Yes. Multi-city planning is part of MonkeyTravel's free planner: unlimited itineraries, no credit card, no trial period. Plan as many multi-city trips as you like.

groupVoting.question: Can my group vote on the stops?
groupVoting.answer: Absolutely. Share your trip via link and everyone can vote on activities and stops, propose changes, and reach consensus before anyone books anything.

cta.title: Ready to Plan Your Multi-City Trip?
cta.subtitle: Add your stops, set your nights, and get one seamless itinerary across every city — free.
cta.mobileNotify: Get notified when the mobile app launches
